appliedUpdates.description: Updated .factory/library/quick-fixes-scrutiny-notes.md with targetOut comparison semantics (lower required input and gas-adjusted total-cost logic) to preserve non-obvious behavior for future workers.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update API endpoint parameter docs for /quote and /compare to include `mode` (`exactIn`/`targetOut`) and document mode-dependent comparison semantics.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: openapi.yaml now documents `mode`, but AGENTS.md endpoint docs still list only chainId/from/to/amount/slippageBps/sender.
